description: Run a site process discovery before blaming hardware or support: observe, earn trust, match bench results to local process, present root cause to decision makers.

examples.context: Mass client update pushed mid-day. Reboots, crashes, drives declared dead. Replacements spiked.
examples.resolution: Bench-good drives. Root cause: update + write damage path. Change update window and replace criteria.

examples.context: EOD habit: kill power strip instead of clean shutdown. Boot failures blamed on disks.
examples.resolution: Shutdown standard rewritten. False disk RMA rate fell.
Presented process root cause with bench data. Joint fix plan; relationship held.
